# The Official Cup of Tea Modpack

This is the Official release of the Cup of Tea modpack made by [@Isabox00](https://www.youtube.com/@Isabox00) on YouTube, managed by LieOnLion.
The pack aims to create a calm and relaxing playthrough of the game making it "feel like a warm Cup of Tea".

> This pack is **not** an exact copy of the pack that Isabox uses, but aims to recreate the feel of the pack while also adding extra improvements for a better general experience. Approved and collaborated with Isabox, the pack is managed by LieOnLion, meaning it may have delays when keeping it accurate to the videos.

![](https://lieonstudios.github.io/assets/v1/banner/png/project/modpack/cup-of-tea/main-menu.png)
<sub>Preview into the next update. Subject to change.</sub>
## Changes

There are a few changes made in this modpack over what Isabox is using in her videos.
- Minecraft has been updated to 1.21.1 (like 99% of 1.21 mods work on 1.21.1).
- Fabric has been updated to the latest version allowing new versions of mods such as [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad).
- Added [Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4) back.
- Added [More Chests Variants - Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcv-biomes-o-plenty).
- Added [More Compatibility Variants (Biomes o' Plenty)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop).
- Added [Farmer's Cutting: Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-biomes-o-plenty).
- Changed [GraveStone Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod) to [Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumono_gravestones).
- Removed [Peaceful Hunger](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peaceful-hunger) due to licensing restrictions. ¹

¹. It is recommended to download and add ([Peaceful Hunger](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peaceful-hunger)) from this curseforge link if you want the proper experience of the pack. The mod's Modrinth versions are yet to get updated, nor can I find a suitable alternative, but when either happens, it will be added to the pack properly.

[**![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/banners/bisect-banner-spruce-chest.png)**](https://bisect.lieonlion.dev)
